text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Ryan's training for the Classics is going
well. Then, one day...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Trainer, this is huge! Have you seen the
Umamusume News?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
McQueen's lost twice in a row! If she keeps on
losing, she won't make it to the Classics!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Here's what the article says... "Absolutely
defeated in terms of strength. Another worrisome
loss with nothing to show for it."

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
I'm gonna go see her—maybe something bad
happened!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: We decide to go visit her together.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Oh, it's Ryan and her trainer. Has something gone
amiss?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Actually, McQueen, we saw your recent race
results and were just wondering... Did something
happen?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
The Classics are coming up soon... Are you okay?
Are you injured or anything?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
You came here today to inquire about me? Well,
in that case...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Why not see for yourself?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Come running with me, Ryan. A light... mile race
should be enough to show you.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Whoa... A mile race?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In other words, a scrimmage on 1,600 meters of
turf.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I act as the referee for the race. When it's over...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Pant, pant, pant... You've really grown stronger, Ryan...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: I won... Is this really because of my training? Or...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
One more time... Let's do it once more, at twice
the distance.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Twice?! Two miles is... 1,600 times two... That's
3,200 meters.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: All right... Let's do this!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: They race again. And the outcome is surprising.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Haaaah!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
How, McQueen?! H-how did you keep up that
pace?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro McQueen finishes without any sign of
exhaustion, at a speed entirely unexpected for a
long-distance race.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Ryan is unable to keep up with such an
impressive display of endurance during the final
stretch.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Pant, pant, cough... How'd you do that? I could never run such a strong lap...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, it's just as I thought. There don't seem to
be any issues with me.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
You can rest assured. I've been in spectacular
condition ever since my debut.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
With regard to long-distance running, there is no
reason for concern.
choice_data_list: McQueen... Was this your plan all along?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Indeed. My goal is to win the G1 race most
befitting of the Mejiro family name. I'm referring,
of course, to the spring Tenno Sho.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
My training regimen is specially tailored for that
goal.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
The Classics are certainly important, but if I chase
two hares at once, the one I'm really after may
escape. I cannot let that happen.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
So you're only focusing on the Tenno Sho in the
spring...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
That's correct. Popular values are not always
shared by everyone.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
I will madly chase after my dream, even if it
means sacrificing the more immediate glory.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
At any rate, I've made my decision. Regardless of
what anyone says, I'll strive to bring what I
believe is most important to the Mejiro family.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Now then... do you still have concerns about me,
Ryan?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Ryan says nothing. She just stands there
silently, her legs shaking... like how she was
before her debut.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Trainer, let's get on with our workouts. Hit me
with everything you've got in training!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
I'm... so ashamed. McQueen is walking a really
intense path toward her goal.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Here I am getting all worried over her safety,
while I neglect my own goal of winning the
Classics.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
At this rate, I won't even qualify. Catching up to
McQueen will be even harder...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
So you have to whip me up into a lean, mean,
fighting machine! The next time I face her, I don't
wanna lose!
choice_data_list: It's going to be tough. Are you okay with that?
It's going to be tough. Are you okay with that?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
For sure! I don't mind being overmatched in
strength, but I refuse to lose because I didn't take
a chance on my dreams. So please!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With impatience written all over her face, Mejiro
Ryan runs with all her might.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She's fighting to both qualify for the Classics and
to prepare for her future encounter with Mejiro
McQueen.
